summary: RBAC STEP 1 Testing Complete - 20/20 backend tests PASSED, Admin UI fully functional. All required features verified: Admin UI login with RBAC, 4 system roles displayed, Create/Edit/Delete roles with permissions, Users management with role assignment, Disable/Enable users, Last super admin protection, and permission-based sidebar.

ui_bugs.issue: Error message 'Accesso non autorizzato' is set but immediately cleared by doLogout() call, so users without permission see a blank error field before being redirected to login

frontend_tests.admin_ui_login: PASSED - Login with admin@fantapronostic.com/admin123 loads dashboard
frontend_tests.permission_based_sidebar: PASSED - All menu items (Stagioni, Giornate, Partite, Leghe, Ruoli & Permessi, Utenti, Pagamenti, Audit Log) visible for super admin
frontend_tests.roles_page_4_system_roles: PASSED - Shows 4 system roles: Super Admin, Moderatore, Gestore Leghe, Osservatore with SISTEMA tag
frontend_tests.create_role_modal: PASSED - Modal opens with name, description fields and 12 permission checkboxes
frontend_tests.edit_role_modal: PASSED - Modal shows pre-selected permissions, allows editing
frontend_tests.delete_role_with_confirmation: PASSED - Shows DELETE confirmation input requirement
frontend_tests.users_page: PASSED - Shows user list with search, role filter, 4 counter cards (72 users, 1 Super Admin, 1 Con Ruoli, 0 Disabilitati)
frontend_tests.assign_roles_modal: PASSED - Modal shows available roles with checkboxes, confirm button
frontend_tests.disable_enable_buttons: PASSED - 72 toggle status buttons visible, users show Attivo/Disabilitato status
frontend_tests.regular_user_access_denied: PASSED - User without admin.dashboard.view permission is logged out and returned to login page

verified_features: Admin UI Login with admin@fantapronostic.com/admin123 - dashboard loads with RBAC-enabled sidebar
Permission-based sidebar: All 8 menu items visible for super admin (Stagioni, Giornate, Partite, Leghe, Ruoli & Permessi, Utenti, Pagamenti, Audit Log)
Roles page shows 4 system roles with SISTEMA tag and cannot be deleted
Custom roles can be created with permissions selected via checkboxes
Custom roles can be edited with pre-selected permissions shown
Custom roles can be deleted with strong DELETE text confirmation
Users page shows user list with search, role filter dropdown, and 4 counter cards
Role assignment modal allows selecting multiple roles for a user
Disabled users get 403 'Account disabilitato' on any API call
Cannot remove own super_admin status (400 error)
SUPER_ADMIN_EMAIL env var used for bootstrapping (line 4651 server.py)
All RBAC actions logged in audit_logs collection
critical_code_review_comments: Admin UI error message race condition: In admin_ui.py doLogin(), the error message is set but then doLogout() is called immediately which re-renders the login page, clearing the error. Consider showing error before logout or using a separate error display mechanism. This is minor - core security works.
No other issues found - RBAC Step 1 implementation is solid
seed_data_creation: Tests created test roles (TEST_*) that are cleaned up after each test run
context_for_next_testing_agent: RBAC STEP 1 fully implemented and tested. Admin UI at /api/admin-ui is a single-page vanilla JS app with RBAC integration. 4 default system roles, permission checkboxes, user disable/enable, strong DELETE confirmation all working. Regular users without admin.dashboard.view permission are logged out (minor UX: error message not visible). All backend endpoints passing.
